revisions.goal: Add private on-device voice dictation for Plan review feedback in the macOS approval app.
revisions.acceptanceCriteria:
- The rejection-feedback area includes an accessible microphone control that starts and stops dictation without leaving the selected Plan.
- Transcription uses the current locale and requires on-device recognition; EVE never silently falls back to network speech recognition.
- Speech and microphone permissions are requested only after the user invokes dictation.
- Unsupported locale, unavailable recognizer, denied permission, recording, transcribing, and failure states are explained inline.
- Partial speech results update the rejection feedback field while preserving text already entered before dictation.
- Starting or stopping dictation cannot discard the selected Plan, existing feedback, or inline Plan edits.
- macOS privacy usage descriptions and audio-input entitlement are configured for Debug and Release builds.
- Swift and Xcode tests/build pass.

milestones.title: On-device transcription service
milestones.goal: Capture microphone audio and stream it to SFSpeechRecognizer with on-device recognition required.

milestones.title: Inline voice feedback UX
milestones.goal: Add accessible recording controls and explicit permission/availability/error states to the rejection flow.

milestones.title: Privacy configuration and verification
milestones.goal: Configure usage descriptions and entitlement, then test state transitions and build the macOS target.
